name: /help shows sample prompts and safety guidance

payload.text:
💡 Here are some things you can try:

"What's the weather like?"
"Help me brainstorm gift ideas"
"Explain quantum computing simply"
"What should I cook for dinner?"

Just type naturally — I'll do my best to help!

🔒 Safety: I keep your chats private and never share your data.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
